title: QosmicExecutiveSummary
description: Executive summary as structured data (D18). LLM-synthesized from the selected experiments. Rendered to prose by assemble.py.

status.description: 'ok' if generated; 'unavailable' if the config (LLM) could not produce it — be honest, do NOT fabricate.

note.description: When status=unavailable, the honest reason shown in the report.

thesis_title.description: Punchy one-line thesis (the report H1), e.g. 'the store is back; the buy path is now the constraint'.

body.description: Supporting prose; references surfaces/evidence already cited by experiments.
